analyze-csv.description: Column-level statistics profile of a CSV (types, nulls, min/max/mean/median/stddev, top values).

code-write-and-test.description: Run agent-written code + assert tests in the ephemeral microVM; return pass/fail.

fetch-and-extract-url.description: GET an allowlisted URL and extract readable text/links/title (tainted output).

remember-fact.description: Dedupe-check then persist a fact to memory (provenance assigned by the control plane).

roman-to-int.description: Wandle eine roemische Zahl (String in skill_input) in ihren Integer-Wert um und weise ihn result zu.

summarize-project-file.description: Structured/extractive digest of a scoped project file (headings, keywords, TODOs).
